calendar.matters:
Status Of Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Michael J. Mandel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Jean Jones, mother of Minor Prince Tynemis Brown.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $1,666.66
Attorney's Fees: $3,333.00 payable to Law Offices of Michael Mandel.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the amount of $326.87 payable to Dept. of Health Care Services.
A net balance of $9,673.47 to be deposited into a blocked account at Northeast Community Federal Credit Union at 683 Clay Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 3/19/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
